creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
Hello,

in the meantime, the port underwent some changes. Since it's not submitted, yet, I attached a new shar file to this ticket, guifi-snpservices.shar, which is the full port. This means, please ignore the original attachment.

The change is temporary data used by the port is put in /var/tmp/snpservices instead of /var/run/snpservices, as it's useful to keep the data the port uses/generates across system reboots (although not crucial).

Thanks
